name: @zorcorp/zorskills
description: ZorCorp AI skill collection for Claude Code, OpenClaw, OpenCode, and Gemini CLI

scripts.prepublishOnly: git submodule update --init --recursive && node -e "const fs=require('fs'),p='plugins';const dirs=fs.readdirSync(p).filter(d=>fs.statSync(p+'/'+d).isDirectory());if(!dirs.length){console.error('plugins/ empty — submodules not checked out');process.exit(1);}console.log('plugins ready:',dirs.join(', '));"

author: ZorCorp
